handlers.name: ChangeSupplyCostsHandler
handlers.description: Modifies supply costs for items matching an optional filter criteria

OnCalculateSupplyCosts.description: Applies cost multiplier to supply costs after filter validation

Create.description: Factory method that creates handler and stores descriptor at offset 0x18

0x58.name: CostMultiplier
0x58.description: Multiplier applied to supply costs via OperationResources.op_Multiply. Value of 1.0 = no change, 0.5 = half cost, 2.0 = double cost

0x60.name: ItemFilter
0x60.description: Optional filter implementing IItemFilter interface. If present, cost modification only applies to items passing filter. If null, applies to all items

handlers.name: ChangeAttackCostHandler
handlers.description: Modifies attack action costs using both flat and multiplicative modifiers

OnUpdate.description: Applies flat and multiplicative cost changes to attack cost data structure

Create.description: Factory method that creates handler and stores descriptor at offset 0x18

0x58.name: FlatCostChange
0x58.description: Flat additive modifier to attack cost. Added directly to costData+0x44 (base cost field). Positive = increase cost, negative = reduce cost

0x5c.name: MultCostChange
0x5c.description: Multiplicative modifier applied via FloatExtensions.AddMult to costData+0x48 (multiplier accumulator). Uses additive percentage stacking (1.5 becomes +0.5 added to accumulator)

0x44.name: BaseCost
0x44.description: Base attack cost value modified by FlatCostChange

0x48.name: CostMultiplier
0x48.description: Accumulated cost multiplier modified by MultCostChange via additive stacking

handlers.name: ChangeDropChanceHandler
handlers.description: Modifies item drop chances when killing enemies

OnCalculateDropChance.description: Adds flat bonus to drop chance percentage

OnTargetKilled.description: Triggered on enemy kill, validates target is enemy Actor and displays skill text/icon

Create.description: Factory method that creates handler and stores descriptor at offset 0x18

0x58.name: DropChanceBonus
0x58.description: Flat additive bonus to drop chance percentage. Added directly to base drop chance value. Example: +10 increases drop chance by 10%

cost_modification_methods.OperationResources.op_Multiply: Used for integer cost multiplication with proper rounding
cost_modification_methods.FloatExtensions.AddMult: Used for multiplicative stacking via additive percentages (mult-1.0 added to accumulator)

ghidra_comments_added.comment: Documented CostMultiplier at 0x58 and IItemFilter at 0x60
Documented FlatCostChange at 0x58 and MultCostChange at 0x5c
